title: Banana Yogurt Oat Bowl
steps: Cook the finely ground oats until soft, then let them cool slightly.
Mash banana until smooth. Stir the fruit into yogurt.
Serve as a smooth spoonable bowl.
safetyNotes: Introduce allergenic foods one at a time and watch for any reaction.

title: Pear Semolina Bowl
steps: Cook semolina with water until thick and smooth.
Cook pear until very soft.
Serve smooth and spoonable.
safetyNotes: Introduce allergenic foods one at a time and watch for any reaction.

title: Apple Oat Mash
steps: Cook apple until very soft.

Serve as a smooth spoonable mash.
safetyNotes: Introduce allergenic foods one at a time and watch for any reaction.
